title: Pathology Slide Classification & LLM Distillation
description: Automated pathology slide classification using CNN and ResNet18 models, achieving 88% balanced accuracy with lightweight model distillation.

title: Pocket Frequency Meter
description: Designed a portable microcontroller-based frequency meter with embedded firmware, achieving ±0.1 Hz accuracy across 100+ test signals.

title: Electronic Password Lock System
description: Implemented an FPGA-based electronic password lock using finite-state machine control, validated through functional testing.

title: Digital Baseband Transmission System Simulation
description: Built a digital baseband transmission simulation to analyze ISI-free filtering and noise effects under AWGN conditions.
